execution_header.scope: Expand the Uniton_Shared to Uniton_Shared_Live sync workflow to include public AIER context packet and health spine files.
execution_header.commit_sha_context: Source HEAD at report generation; final evidence commit is verified after push.

in_scope_actions: Read sync expansion plan, packet/health files, LAW_GITHUB_01, LAW_N5, and current sync workflow.
Security-scan the seven proposed public state files.
Add workflow path filters, copy commands, and SYNC_INFO file/raw URL entries for the seven public state files.

No private canon/law/skill/lab/rule directory added to mirror sync.

repo_boundary_check.notes: Uniton_Shared_Live was not edited directly; only the Uniton_Shared source workflow was changed.
